task.title: Enable gradient_checkpointing_enable() on SAM3 backbone
task.description: Add gradient_checkpointing param to Sam3Backbone.__init__(). When True and freeze=False: call self.encoder.gradient_checkpointing_enable( gradient_checkpointing_kwargs={"use_reentrant": False}). use_reentrant=False is required for autocast compatibility. Library-first: HuggingFace PreTrainedModel native feature (Rule #3).

tdd-approach.red: Create tests/v2/unit/adapters/test_sam3_gradient_checkpointing.py: - test_sam3_backbone_accepts_gradient_checkpointing_param - test_topolora_adapter_passes_gradient_checkpointing_to_backbone - test_topolora_adapter_default_no_gradient_checkpointing These will FAIL because Sam3Backbone doesn't accept the param yet. NOTE: Use mocks for Sam3Backbone — real SAM3 weights not in CI.
tdd-approach.green: 1. Sam3Backbone.__init__: add gradient_checkpointing: bool = False 2. After _load_sam3_encoder(): if gradient_checkpointing and not freeze: self.encoder.gradient_checkpointing_enable(kwargs={"use_reentrant": False}) 3. Sam3TopoLoraAdapter: read from config.architecture_params, pass to backbone 4. Sam3HybridAdapter: pass but backbone ignores (freeze=True)

task.title: Skip check_gradient_flow() for gradient-checkpointed models
task.description: The diagnostic forward+backward in check_gradient_flow() does NOT use gradient checkpointing, so it would still OOM for SAM3. Skip it when the model uses gradient checkpointing. Other 3 checks still run.

tdd-approach.green: 1. Add skip_gradient_flow: bool = False to run_pre_training_checks() 2. When True: append CheckResult(name="gradient_flow", passed=True, message="Skipped — model uses gradient checkpointing") 3. Wire in train_flow.py: skip when gradient_checkpointing=True

task.title: Wire gradient_checkpointing through factorial config → env → train_flow
task.description:
Same pattern as batch_size/grad_accum: model_overrides in YAML → run_factorial.sh parses → --env GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING → train_flow.py argparse → config dict → architecture_params → Sam3Backbone.
Authorized by issue #966.

tdd-approach.green: 1. debug.yaml + paper_full.yaml: add gradient_checkpointing: true to sam3 overrides 2. run_factorial.sh: parse + pass --env GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING 3. train_factorial.yaml: add GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING default 4. train_flow.py: argparse + training_flow param + config dict + architecture_params

task.title: Docker rebuild + SAM3 TopoLoRA cloud validation
task.description:
METALEARNING RULE: Do NOT claim "fixed" until sky jobs logs shows "Epoch 1/2" with actual loss values. Job duration ≠ training time.
Must see in logs: - "SAM3 encoder gradient checkpointing ENABLED (non-reentrant)" - "Pre-training checks: 4/4 passed" (or 3/4 with gradient_flow skipped) - "Epoch 1/2" with train/loss value - VRAM peak < 16 GB (logged via vram/peak_mb metric)

steps.step: sky jobs logs JOB_ID — verify ACTUAL training output

final-gate.criterion: sky jobs logs shows Epoch 1/2 with loss values for SAM3
VRAM peak < 16 GB reported in logs
